name: Angle bracket
description: Perpendicular legs with optional inner-corner gussets and through-holes. Rests flat on the bottom face for printing.

parameters.label: Leg 1 length
parameters.description: Length of the horizontal leg (along X), measured along the outer flat.

parameters.label: Leg 2 length
parameters.description: Length of the vertical leg (along Z after the bend).

parameters.label: Width (plate depth)
parameters.description: Depth of both legs in Y — how wide the bracket is when viewed from above.

parameters.label: Plate thickness
parameters.description: Wall thickness of both legs (and minimum feature size for FDM).

parameters.label: Inner bend radius
parameters.description: Quarter-circle relief on the inside corner of the bend (printer-friendly stress relief). Automatically capped to the plate thickness and leg-2 length so the arc never overflows the profile — bigger values are silently clamped.

parameters.label: Gusseted inner corner
parameters.description: Adds triangular gusset plates in the inside corner for stiffness.

parameters.label: Gusset height
parameters.description: How far each gusset extends along the inner faces from the bend.

parameters.label: Gusset thickness
parameters.description: Gusset extent across the bracket width (Y), centered on each gusset’s mid-plane so changing thickness grows equally to both sides.

parameters.label: Gusset count
parameters.description: Number of gusset plates along Y (1–4).

parameters.label: Outer corner fillet
parameters.description: Rounds the outer corner of the bend (between the bottom face and the outer vertical face) with a quarter-circle arc. Softens the silhouette and removes a sharp FDM corner. Automatically capped to half of leg-1 length so the fillet can never swallow the bracket.

parameters.label: Hole diameter
parameters.description: Used when "Custom" bolt size is selected in the mounting section.

parameters.label: Holes on leg 1
parameters.description: Through-holes on the horizontal leg (along Z axis). Evenly spaced between edge offsets.

parameters.label: Holes on leg 2
parameters.description: Through-holes on the vertical leg (along X). Evenly spaced between edge offsets.

parameters.label: Hole rows (width)
parameters.description: Parallel rows of holes across the bracket width (Y). The generator caps this from width, hole diameter, and minimum hole-to-edge clearance so rows stay separated. Gussets are placed only in gaps between rows so they cannot cover mounting holes.

parameters.label: Hole edge offset
parameters.description: Minimum distance from each leg end toward the first/last hole center (before edge clamping).

parameters.label: Countersunk holes
parameters.description: Conical recess for flat-head screws on the outside of each leg only (horizontal leg: +Z face; vertical leg: +X outside). Countersink angle follows bolt preset (90° metric, 82° UNC); opening diameter and depth are limited for 3D-printed walls.

parameters.label: Slotted holes
parameters.description: Elongate holes along the spacing direction on each leg for easier alignment.

parameters.label: Extra slot length
parameters.description: Added length (mm) along the slot direction beyond the bolt clearance diameter.

parameters.label: Minimum hole-to-edge
parameters.description: Keeps hole centers away from stock edges so holes cannot break out (mm).

parameters.label: XY hole compensation
parameters.description: Extra radius on holes for printer tolerance (subtract from nominal).
